SECURITY.md

```markdown
# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities to security@zk-operational-badges.io

Do NOT open public issues for security vulnerabilities.

We will acknowledge receipt within 48 hours and provide regular updates on the fix progress.

## Security Best Practices

- Always verify zero-knowledge proofs off-chain before on-chain submission
- Use hardware security modules for key generation
- Regularly update dependencies
- Monitor contract events for suspicious activity
```
# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
Only the latest version of the SDK is supported for security updates.

## Reporting a Vulnerability
**Do not open a public issue.** Please report security vulnerabilities privately by emailing **gitdigitalproducts@gmail.com**. We aim to respond within 12 hours for critical blockchain-related vulnerabilities.
